name: Spicy Parmesan Chicken
recipeIngredient: 2 whole chicken breasts, boneless and skinless
or 1 broiler chicken, cut into pieces and skin removed
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 375°F.
2. Place the chicken in a 9x13-inch baking pan, bone-side down.
3. Sprinkle the Parmesan cheese and Italian seasoning evenly over the chicken.
4. If using two breasts, bake for 15 minutes. If using broiler chicken, bake for 45 minutes.
5. Sprinkle with Mozzarella cheese and bake an additional minute.
6. Serve with salsa.
Yield: 4 servings
